releaseNotes:
Release v0.7.1

Improvements:
- Redesign docs to match Project Succession app style (PS-136)
- Make the whole node-card a click target in docs (PS-136)
- Style Custom Python Nodes toggle to match other checkboxes (PS-137)

Bug Fixes:
- Evaluate parameterExpressions on triggers at configure-time (PS-130)
- Guard backend launch against re-fire on license refresh (PS-135)
- Launch backend on free tier, not just active paid licenses (PS-135)
- Force per-machine Windows install, drop dead service WiX (PS-135)
- Robust sidecar and docs path resolution (PS-135)
- Add Linux .deb candidates for documentation path (PS-135)
- Markdown parser handles indented fences and code-block pipes (PS-136)
- Shield code blocks from downstream regex passes (PS-136)
- Tighten selection-panel max-width to clear Execute button (PS-138)
- Prevent WorkArea panel overlap on small screens (PS-138)
- Custom Python nodes no longer receive packed wrapper on data connections
